// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using ZeroAlloc.Flux;

namespace ZeroAlloc.Flux.Generated;

internal sealed class FluxDispatcher : IDispatcher
{
    private readonly IServiceProvider _sp;

    public FluxDispatcher(IServiceProvider sp)
    {
        _sp = sp;
    }

    public ValueTask DispatchAsync(global::Sample.IncrementAction action)
    {
        var store_CounterState = (Store_Sample_CounterState)_sp.GetRequiredService<IStore<global::Sample.CounterState>>();
        return store_CounterState.UpdateAsync(global::Sample.CounterReducers.OnInc(store_CounterState.Value, action));
    }

    public ValueTask DispatchAsync(global::Sample.DecrementAction action)
    {
        var store_CounterState = (Store_Sample_CounterState)_sp.GetRequiredService<IStore<global::Sample.CounterState>>();
        return store_CounterState.UpdateAsync(global::Sample.CounterReducers.OnDec(store_CounterState.Value, action));
    }

    public ValueTask DispatchAsync<TAction>(TAction action)
    {
        return ValueTask.CompletedTask;
    }
}
